<!-- Code generated from the comments of the S3Config struct in post-processor/mws-export/config.go; DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY -->

- `service_account` (string) - MWS Service Account for generation of temporal hmac-key.
  Required, unless access_key and secret_key are provided

- `access_key` (string) - AccessKey is part of hmac-key pair for S3.

- `secret_key` (string) - SecretKey is part of hmac-key pair for S3.

- `s3_region` (string) - S3 region where the bucket is located (defaults to "ru-central1").

- `s3_key` (string) - S3 path where the image will be stored (defaults to "packer-images/{{image_for_export}}.qcow2")

- `s3_endpoint` (string) - Endpoint of S3 to upload image (defaults to "https://storage.mwsapis.ru").

<!-- End of code generated from the comments of the S3Config struct in post-processor/mws-export/config.go; -->
